cases.prompt: AI 에이전트 만들어줘 — tool use로 날씨 API 호출하고 결과 정리하는

assertions.text: Defines explicit tool/function schemas for the weather API call.
Designs a plan→execute loop with a clear termination condition.
Includes guardrails, loop-prevention, and an observability/cost cap.

cases.prompt: Build a multi-agent system with function calling for my app

assertions.text: Selects an explicit topology (fan-out / pipeline / supervisor).
Covers Claude tool_use or Gemini function calling concretely.
Addresses memory/state management across agent steps.

cases.prompt: Claude Code에서 sub-agent로 보안·성능 점검 나눠서 시켜줘

assertions.text: Recognizes this is Claude Code subagent delegation (agent-delegate[Core]), NOT building a product agent, and redirects.
